overview.description: The Novo Nordisk A/S (B Shares) ADRhedged (NVOH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund provides exposure to Novo Nordisk A/S (B Shares) ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of Novo Nordisk A/S (B Shares), in its local market, to US investors. NVOH was launched on Jan 2, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
